name: kg-suite-fleet-overview-action
description: GitHub Action that walks a mixed-protocol directory of Kinetic Gain Suite JSON documents, routes each via kg-protocol-detect, groups by (protocol, spec_version), and posts a unified one-page composition overview as a PR comment. Optionally fail the run when core protocols are missing from the fleet or unrouted documents exceed a threshold. Cross-protocol composition action — companion to spec-version-tracker / conformance-runner / canonicalize.
author: mizcausevic-dev
